full_text:
Zheng Chong (Zihe)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Chong, styledZihe, was born in Henan. Expert in internal medicine, lived in secret for some time. Much admired member of Sun Deng’s court. Zheng Chong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zheng Chong lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
